name: calendar-event-consumer
description: Calendar_Event_Consumer — scheduling sub-phase B Tasks B9 + B10. SQS consumer of the typed booking.* events the Calendar_Watch_Listener (B2) dispatches. Owns two event types: booking.ooo_overlap_detected (B9 §14.2 — flag the conflict on every booking in overlapping_booking_ids + fire an admin alert) and booking.attendee_declined (B10 §14.2 — transition Booking.status booked→canceled). All other event types are logged and discarded (another consumer owns them). Idempotency via conditional Booking-row writes (no separate dedupe table). B9 volunteer reoffer + B10 reminder-suppression/defensive-poll are out of scope and escalated/stubbed. Consumes the frozen shared/booking-status SoT; never modifies it.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
